title: Who is ‘Pookie Don’? Thane Builder-Influencer Arrested After 371 Cartridges, 167 Pellets Found at Home
description: Thane builder and influencer Surendra Patil, aka ‘Pookie Don’, arrested after police recover illegal weapons, cartridges, and ammunition worth ₹10 lakh from his Dombivli home; probe underway.
